prompt:
Create a refined production-quality mobile app UI mockup based on the previous Option 5 function-center design for a Chinese teacher mini-program page named 我的. Target dimensions: 864 x 1536 portrait. Single screen, no phone frame, no browser chrome. This is a refinement, not a new random style.

Main adjustment goals: mobile-app logic first. Typography must be realistic for a mobile app: section titles around 30-34px in this high-resolution mockup, item labels around 24-26px, teacher name around 34-38px, school text around 24-26px. Avoid oversized display text. Icons must be app-entry sized: colorful rounded icons around 82-96px, not huge illustration assets. Keep enough touch area but make the icon visual smaller and more refined.

Visual style: strengthen futuristic light-tech feeling with diffuse gradients. Use a pale blue-white background with soft cyan, moon-blue, lilac and petal-pink gradient haze, subtle glass highlights, faint geometric light lines, but no dark cyberpunk and no strong neon. White rounded function cards with 28-32px radius, soft shadow, subtle border, translucent glass feeling.

Business content: C-end transformation teacher side My page, school-version user with multiple class sources. Header: Chinese female teacher avatar, 刘飞飞老师, 成都七中初中附属小学, current source pill 成都市未来实验小学, scan and settings icon buttons. Two large function groups inspired by clean app center layout. First group title 常用功能 with four entries: 学校数据报表, 生成期末报告, 货币发放, 我的文件. Second group title 更多功能 with six entries: 科目管理, 部门管理, 建议反馈, 班级来源, 扫一扫, 设置. Bottom navigation: 记录, 班级, 我的 active. Do not include explanatory notes, annotations, placeholder copy, logic descriptions, or PRD remarks.
